trivia_bullets.text: Previewed June 11, 2020, via a Wizards of the Coast article framing it as a Selesnya (green-white) signpost card for M21 Limited. Signals to drafters the Selesnya lifegain-and-go-wide strategy at common rarity.
sources: Scryfall preview field: source Wizards of the Coast, source_uri magic.wizards.com/en/articles/archive/card-preview/signpost-selesnya-2020-06-11

trivia_bullets.text: "Its exploits are the stuff of legends among local chefs and fuel for nightmares among the forest thallids." The thallid reference grounds the card in MTG Dominarian lore: thallids are sentient fungal creatures originating in Fallen Empires (1994), created by druid Thelon of Havenwood, who eventually revolted against their elvish creators and dominated Havenwood. A truffle-hunting boar is an ecological predator of thallid-kin.
sources: MTGSalvation: 'A Brief History of Dominaria's Thallids' (WebSearch snippet via mtgsalvation.com)

trivia_bullets.text: 2/2 Boar for 3 mana, modal ETB: grow (3/3) or heal (gain 4 life). Clean draft role card. EDHREC rank 23,159. Legal in Pauper and Paupercommander.
Art by Jason Kang. No Hipsters of the Coast artist spotlight found for Kang at time of research.

related_cards.name: Thallid
related_cards.note: The MTG fungus creature type name-dropped in Trufflesnout's flavor text

related_cards.name: Thelon of Havenwood
related_cards.note: The druid who created thallids in MTG lore; relevant to the flavor text reference

related_cards.name: Tusked Mammoth
related_cards.note: Another M21 green common beast with naturalist aesthetic in same draft environment
